title: The Uninvited
overview: A strange man is found by a girl and her family and nursed back to health. He appears to have lost all of his memories, and can't seem to remove a mask of bone affixed to his forehead.

title: Ruler of the Wild Forest
overview: The Queen of the forest, Mutikapa, is angered and begins killing some of the townspeople. Hakuoro works with the others to figure out a way to defeat it.

title: Violet and Amber
overview: Tusukuru is thought to be missing from the village though is later found offering aid to a young girl with a strange affliction.

title: One-Way Path
overview: Tusukuru is inadvertently killed and members from the village go on a mission to kill the feudal lord responsible.

title: Daughter of the Forest
overview: Hakuoro takes over command of the station which he captures, beginning to strategically lead a large-scale rebellion. When rallying troops to rise up against the oppressive government, however, he runs into Benawi, the empire's Samurai leader.

title: Gathering Force
overview: Hakuoro gains more men at his command and once again has a battle involving Benawi and the men he commands.

title: Invasion of the Imperial City
overview: Finally, Hakuoro's small army reaches the castle of Emperor Inkara, to find, when they arrive, that he had already died by Benawi's blade. After this, Benawi and Kurou join Hakuoro.

title: The Mediator
overview: Several Onkami come to Hakuoro's castle as arbitators and to gather more information on his new country Tusukuru.

title: Taboo
overview: As the large country of Shikeripetim threatens invasion, Hakouro devises a cunning plan to hold off Shikeripetim's emperor, Niwe, and his far superior military force.

title: The Mercenary
overview: A powerful mercenary is brought to the castle and held captive until she is able to show her worth as a fighter and joins Hakuoro's army.

title: Everlasting Promise
overview: Kuccha Keccha attacks Erurū's former village and massacres the inhabitants. In response to continued attacks, Tusukuru is forced to declare war with them.

title: Unrest
overview: Kuccha Keecha turns out to be a more formidable opponent than originally anticipated, more so now that they have the support of the Evinkuruga Touka. Hakuoro tries to find another way to attain victory.

title: A Bloody Battle
overview: Hakuoro's plan to defeat the Kuccha Keccha succeeds and he confronts Emperor Orikakan; the result of their encounter however, is quite unexpected.

title: The Ravages of War
overview: More helpless villages in Tusukuru are attacked by Niwe, the emperor of Shikeripetim, as he advances through the countryside. Hakuoro hatches a desperate plan in order to defend his nation.

title: End of the Banquet
overview: A final decisive battle between Hakuoro and Niwe begins in Shikeripetim's capital.

title: At the End of the Battle
overview: Hakuoro is still haunted by what Niwe said to him and has nightmares about it. Later a duel between Benawi and Oboro takes places to see how strong each is. Near the end of the episode, Hakuoro is introduced to another emperor named Kuuya.

title: The Young Sovereign
overview: Kuuya and Hakuoro have a long talk alone about the world they live in and the state of affairs. Later, Oboro is suffering from a hangover and must take Erurū revolting medicine in order for it to pass quicker. Also, the trader from before comes back to sell them a Mikyūm which is a rare and extremely valuable animal. Finally, Hakuoro has yet another private discussion with Kuuya where he discovers that the masked emperor is in fact a young girl.

title: The Rebel Army
overview: Karura's younger brother Derihouri is leading a revolt in a neighboring country though his small army is no match for the force he is trying to oppose. It will take the aid of Hakuoro, Karura and the several others to overcome the emperor.

title: Farewells
overview: Derihouri, with the aide of Hakuoro and his party and a secret from Karura's past, infiltrate the capital of Nan-tunk, only to discover that the Kenam rebellion was formed with ulterior motives.

title: First Battle
overview: Kuuya talks again with Hakuoro. Later she reveals her plans of war with the other countries. Thus Hakuoro is left with the decision to help her or not. Hakuoro tries to dissuade her, but to no avail.

title: The Great Seal
overview: Kuuya, convinced by her bloodthirsty advisers, starts a war against every nation in order to unite the whole continent. Soon the war reaches Hakuoro's empire. The avu-kamuu of Kuuya seem unstoppable, and Hakuoro decides to evacuate the capital.

title: Odious Pact
overview: As the forces of Emperor Kuuya descend upon Tusukuru's capital, Hakuoro realizes that the evacuation is going to take longer than they have, and so decides to sacrifice himself to draw their attention away. However, Aruruu isn't prepared to let this happen, and shows up riding Mukkuru. The immortal Mutikapa is able to attack the Avu-Kamuu without being hurt, but Aruruu is hit with a single blow and died. However, the pool of blood growing behind Aruruu begins to bring back Hakuoro's memories, and new questions start arising in his mind: What is he? What unknown powers does he harbor?

title: Where the Heart Lies
overview: The first heavy defeat in battle with Kuuya in the previous episode slows down the war. In the next, relatively calm, days Hakuoro remembers some of his past. Who really is the Iceman? Why does this "Mikoto" in his memories resemble Erurū so much? Genjimaru leaves Kunnekamun since he knows they are on a path to annihilation. He joins Hakuoro offering his guide for the armies. Genjimaru seems to be betraying Kuuya, but he acts this way since he wants to save her from the war. Understanding that, Hakuoro accepts his help. The first step is unite all the rebels left by Kunnekamun's passage. In order to do that, Hakuoro arranges a mission to rescue the Oruyankuru. The old man is saved, but then he declares that Urutorii is the new Oruyankuru and retires.

title: On the Path of Destruction
overview: With the help of the rebels and Genjimaru's military command the Tusukuru empire stops Kunnekamun and soon turns the tables of the war. Inside the castle of Kuuya the final battle ensues, but there are more factions at work than just Tusukuru and Kunnekamun...

title: Traces of an Ancient Dream
overview: The episode begins with the fate of Kuuya being revealed. Hakuoro rushes to Onkami Yamukai to rescue Kamyu, but all is not as it seems. Hakouro's true identity is confirmed and he remembers more of the Iceman's heartbreaking story.

title: Him Whose Song is Sung
overview: After a climatic battle and the final pieces of Hakouro's past being revealed, Hakouro makes a very difficult decision that will forever have an impact on the future.

title: Curse
overview: A young man, with amnesia, finds himself in a foreign world where people with animal ears and tails live. But, being that this world has monsters, and isn’t a modern society, he finds himself reliant on his assumed guardian to survive.

title: The Righteous Man
overview: The village is under attack by monsters called gigiri, small insects with nasty claws. Haku and Kuon go with a group of mercenaries to help wipe them out, but get more than they bargained for when they run into a boro-gigiri, a monster that's over 30 feet tall.

title: The Road to the Capital
overview: Haku and Kuon travel to the capital, but their journey is interrupted by a bandit attack.

title: The Imperial Capital
overview: Having reached the capital, Haku and gang look for work... but not before partying. That's when a girl named Nekone appears before them, and she's actually Ukon's little sister.

title: The Pirate Girl
overview: Haku's busy days of working hard in the mornings and afternoon and studying at night are wearing down his mind. However, his hard work pays off when he's finally given a vacation. With his freedom and a little money, he sets out to the capital.

title: The Master of the Inn
overview: The inn where Haku's staying, the Hakuroukaku, is known for its beautiful owner. She sends him a letter and invites him to a banquet. He goes, but...

title: The Young Princess
overview: The emperor of Yamato holds absolute loyalty from his subjects. And his daughter, Anju, has her birthday approaching. Hakuroukaku finds itself with a strange visitor. Kuon's eyes shine coldly at this selfish young girl.

title: Imperial Capital Detective Stories
overview: A lone passenger ship set sail in the night fog. It turns out to be a hub for illegal gambling.

title: Messengers from the Land Where Gods Sleep
overview: A messenger arrives at Yamato, claiming he's from a land beyond the eastern sea.

title: In Love
overview: Anju is in love with Oshutoru, the royal general. But because she is the imperial princess, she can't fall in love like ordinary people do. Kuon and the others try their best to help her.

title: The Princess Plays with Fire
overview: The princess has decided to pretend to be kidnapped, in hopes that Oshutoru will come and save her. She enlists Nosuri's help and Haku is forced to help too. But Nosuri has no idea who she really is, and when Oshutoru comes, Haku is forced to face him alone...!

title: Kamunagi of Chains
overview: For his services in saving the princess, Haku is invited to the palace and given an audience with the emperor. He is gifted two girls who are called the Priestesses of Chains. But he doesn't realize the deep meaning they possess.

title: The Eight Pillar Generals
overview: Yamato is threatened by a barbarian invasion from the north, but the town doesn't seem worried at all. The eight pillar generals mount a counterattack, and Haku finds himself dragged along.

title: Blade Master
overview: The invading forces are taking Yamato citizens hostage and using them as front line troops against the Eight Pillar generals. Rurutie and Haku go on a dangerous mission behind enemy lines to release the hostages' loved ones.

title: Masks
overview: The ancient power of the masks is brought down to bear on the invading Usuurussha armies. The armies are torn apart by the power of the Eight Pillar Generals, but is the cost to Yamato's own citizens too great?

title: Banquet
overview: After returning from the war, Haku is deeply depressed. The girls all offer him gifts to cheer him up, but it doesn't help. So all the men decide to have a massive banquet and drink together. It gets out of hand and everyone starts taking off their clothes..

title: Afterglow
overview: The truth behind Haku's past is revealed. What is his connection to the emperor, and to the mysterious and powerful masks?

title: Invasion
overview: The Emperor has declared war on Tousukuru, and Haku is summoned to join the fight. Will Kuon be willing to fight against her homeland?

title: In Flames
overview: The war against Tousukuru is going poorly, and Haku is sent with reinforcements. Munechika turns to him to come up with a plan to break the stalemate.

title: Warrior
overview: Haku comes up with a brilliant plan to attack the fortress where the Tousukuru provisions are stored. But he's discovered by a general who's as powerful as his entire group combined!

title: Death of the Emperor
overview: The Emperor is dead, and now his daughter must take his place. But the Eight Pillar Generals have other ideas. She is poisoned and Oshutoru is blamed for the killing. Will Haku be able to make it in time?

title: Rescue
overview: The emperor is dead, and Anju has been poisoned. Oshutoru takes the blame for the crime. Haku mounts a daring plan to rescue him.

title: Escape
overview: The chase is on as Haku attempts to smuggle Oshutoru and Anju from the capital. But will he be able to flee the combined might of the eight pillar generals?

title: What Makes a Ruler
overview: The race is on to escape the capital as the rest of the Eight Pillar Generals seek Oshutoru's death. Burai corners Haku and his friends, and the only way to survive is for a wounded Oshutoru to use the power of his cursed mask.

title: Who Carries On His Will
overview: The princess and the rest of the group have successfully fled to Enna-Kamui to ready themselves for the coming civil war. Oshutoru and Nekone arrive later, bearing bad news: Haku is dead.

title: Beside the Iron Fan
overview: After their flight from the capital, Anju is poisoned, Oshtor is dead and Haku has taken his place. Now Haku must rebuild their army and protect Anju, while keep his identity secret from his friends.

title: Whereabouts of Resolve
overview: As Kiwru and the forces of Oshtor's guard race to Ennakamuy, Haku and his new army must rush to aid them.

title: Stain the Road Crimson
overview: Haku faces his first real test, as Dekopompo moves against Ennakamuy. He's bringing thousands of troops with him, and a familiar face as well...

title: Unrequited Love
overview: Kuon wakes up back home in Tuskur, with no memory of how she got there. Remembering, though, won't help her save Haku.

title: Opposing Pair
overview: Haku is visited by a mysterious merchant who claims to be sent by Kuon. And Mikazuchi, the Imperial Guard of the Left, pays a visit to Ennakamuy as well...

title: Dominant Princess
overview: Kuon challenges Anju, who she believes to be a spoiled brat that has no right to rule Yamato.

title: Speaking to a Princess
overview: Kuon does her best to batter Anju into submission so that she'll remain in Ennakamuy instead of trying to retake Yamato.

title: Return
overview: Kuon comes back to Ennakamuy, this time as the friend they all love and know.

title: The One Who Bears the Flute
overview: The party travels to Rulutieh's homeland, where one member of her family doesn't want her to leave.

title: Forest of Schemes
overview: The party goes to visit Nosuri's home, where one of the Eight Pillar Generals wants to ally with them.

title: Proof of a Ruler
overview: Tokifusa corners the party in the Great Canyon near Ennakamuy and tries to kill them to get back the Golden Seal.

title: Flames of Dark Obsession
overview: In their battle to liberate Nakoku, the party finds themselves against a foe they never expected to face.

title: A Vow to Rebuild
overview: With Nakoku safe, the party heads home to Ennakamuy for the next stage of the war.

title: The Night Before the Final Battle
overview: The party takes a breather before the final battle begins for control of Yamato.

title: Slim Chance of Survival
overview: As the battle with Raiko and the forces of the court begins, Haku will have to do whatever it takes to survive their onslaught.

title: Legends Clash
overview: Haku battles Mikazuchi as their armies clash on the plains before the capital city.

title: The Price of Resolve
overview: The battle between Haku and the court's forces comes to a shocking conclusion.

title: With a Great Wish in One's Heart
overview: The Yamato civil war comes to an end as Raiko makes one last stand.

title: The Role Left to Me
overview: With the civil war over, Haku is tasked with setting out on a new journey.

title: To Tuskur
overview: Haku heads to Tuskur, where he meets the princess of the kingdom.

title: Humanity's Heir
overview: The truth behind the Master Key is revealed.

title: The Door to Wisdom
overview: Woshis steals the Master Key and attempts to use it for his own ends.

title: In the Land of Awakenings
overview: Woshis's drive to attain ultimate wisdom comes at a terrible price for the whole world.

title: A Voice from the Abyss
overview: Haku races to stop eternal winter from befalling on the world just as a new threat arises.

title: Twisted Onkami
overview: An unexpected ally appears to save Haku and his friends from the Noroi.

title: The End of a Wish
overview: Woshis makes a last attempt to grab power and end the world.

title: Start of a Myth
overview: Haku is forced to make a final decision as Woshis clings to power.

title: Mask of Truth
overview: Haku is gone, and his friends go to search for him.
